rows.label: qev090205_MSG0003
rows.name: Welcome back. How'd the hunt go today?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090205_MSG0004
rows.name: Piece of cake. Hell, CUPCAKE![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090205_MSG0005
rows.name:
Seems like you're having an
awful lot of fun lately, Yelv.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090205_MSG0006
rows.name:
I hear you actually went out and
found that mission for yourself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090205_MSG0007_m
rows.name:
This new partner seems
to be good for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090205_MSG0007_f
rows.name:
This new partner seems
to be good for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090205_MSG0008
rows.name:
Hey, stay outta my biz, lady! ...Look,
you got any new jobs, or what?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090205_MSG0009
rows.name:
Somebody's a busy beaver. Hmm,
what's a mission you'd like...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090205_MSG0010
rows.name:
How about doing a little detective
work over in Valley of Oblivion?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090205_MSG0011
rows.name:
We heard reports that a piece of
the White Whale landed there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090205_MSG0012
rows.name: No one's been out to see it yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090205_MSG0013
rows.name:
Heh, that does sound pretty juicy. Not
bad comin' from the likes of you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090205_MSG0014
rows.name:
Well, pard? Wanna go before
somebody beats us to it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090205_JNK0010
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev090205_SEL0011
rows.name:
Tell Yelv that you are
ready to go when he is.

rows.label: qev090205_JNK0020
rows.name: Decline

rows.label: qev090205_SEL0021
rows.name: Say that you should go prepare first.

rows.label: qev090205_MSG0015
rows.name: Ha! I love it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090205_MSG0016
rows.name:
What, and let some other jokers
steal our prize? I don't think so![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090205_MSG0017
rows.name: Let's get goin'.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090205_MSG0018
rows.name:
Shoot the deets to our comm
devices, would ya, El?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090205_MSG0019
rows.name: Of course. Good luck out there, you two.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090205_MSG0020
rows.name:
I hope you can finally find
what you're looking for, Yelv.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090205_MSG0021
rows.name:
Wait a sec... Is THAT why
you gave me this gig?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090205_MSG0022
rows.name:
Of all the nosy, busybody... I ain't
owin' you any favors for this![ST:wait ]
